subjects.subject_name: Department of Health and Human Services

calendar.description: House Health and Human Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses the regulation of milk or milk products.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>modifies an exemption from certain dairy regulations;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>outlines general requirements related to raw milk or raw milk products;<hr><ltbullet>addresses prohibited counts in raw milk;<hr><ltbullet>prescribes labeling;<hr><ltbullet>provides for the suspension and reissuance of permits;<hr><ltbullet>addresses foodborne illness outbreaks;<hr><ltbullet>addresses cease and desist orders;<hr><ltbullet>addresses rulemaking;<hr><ltbullet>provides for fees;<hr><ltbullet>imposes penalties;<hr><ltbullet>exempts from certain requirements sales or deliveries of raw milk or raw products from a farm;<hr><ltbullet>provides for an exemption for small producers;<hr><ltbullet>provides for no severability; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
